title: WIPI2d Expression and purification
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fn7no","text":"WIPI2d expression and purification from HEK cells ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Transfect 300 mL of HEK GNTI cells
Resuspended pellet in 25mL of lysis buffer (50mM Hepes pH 7.45, 300mM NaCl, 1mM TCEP, 1% Triton X, PI cocktail)
Rock supernatant with equilibrated strep resin for 02:00:00 at 4 °C
Wash with 50CV wash buffer (50mM Hepes pH 7.45, 300mM NaCl, 1mM TCEP)
Concentrate elution and inject onto pre-equilibrated S200 10/30 column (25mM Hepes pH 7.45, 150mM NaCl, 1mM TCEP)
Elute 2X with 5mL of wash buffer spiked with 5mM des-thiobiotin
Pool peak fractions, concentrate, snap freeze, and store at -80C
In a separate tube, dilute DNA with Hybridoma-SFM(1X)
Add PEI to DNA dilution. Incubate mixture for 00:30:00 at 37 °C
Add mixture to cells. Let cells grow for 60:00:00
Wash pellet with cold PBS. Store pellet until Puification.
creator: lmstrong
